title: An Act authorizing the town of Millis to establish a means-tested senior citizen property tax exemption for school building construction projects

abstracts.abstract: By Representative Arena-DeRosa of Holliston, a petition (accompanied by bill, House, No. 4605) of James C. Arena-DeRosa (by vote of the town) that the town of Millis be authorized to establish a means-tested senior citizen property tax exemption for school building construction projects.  Revenue.  [Local Approval Received.]

actions.description: Referred to the committee on Revenue
Hearing scheduled for 01/27/2026 from 01:00 PM-05:00 PM in A-1 & A-2
Hearing rescheduled to 01/27/2026 from 01:00 PM-02:25 PM in A-1 and Virtual Hearing updated to New End Time
Bill reported favorably by committee and referred to the committee on House Steering, Policy and Scheduling

related_entities.name: committee on House Steering, Policy and Scheduling
the committee on House Steering, Policy and Scheduling

actions.description: Committee reported that the matter be placed in the Orders of the Day for the next sitting
Read second and ordered to a third reading
